column1: # tests/vm_parity/PARITY.tsv — the VM parity manifest (adversarial P5 ratchet).
# Every symbol on the native codegen surface (see scripts/vm_parity_audit.py)
# must be either present on the VM surface or carry a row here.  Statuses:
#   vm-supported           the VM resolves this name / implements this op
#   gap                    acknowledged hole or verified divergence (justification required)
# Rows referencing found/<file>.esk are VERIFIED behavioral divergences: the
# name exists on both surfaces but the VM computes something different.
# Seeded 2026-07-03 from the live extraction; regenerate a skeleton with
